key_insights.insight: Clarity about one's path emerges from actively trying things rather than passively thinking about them.
key_insights.quote: Clarity comes from engagement, not thought.

key_insights.insight: Being honest with yourself about what you don't want is empowering and frees up energy for what truly matters.
key_insights.quote: 99% of the time when we human beings say can't, it's a euphemism for won't.

key_insights.insight: Entrepreneurs who maintain a day job while starting their business are less likely to fail.
key_insights.quote: Those who kept their day job as they started their business were 33% less likely to fail.

key_insights.insight: The ability to quit is an important skill, and we shouldn't glamorize starting things without understanding that
key_insights.quote: Quitting is the equally important thing you have to do before you start. And so quitting is just as much of a skill as starting anything.

key_insights.insight: The body provides intuitive guidance; pay attention to physical sensations of expansion or contraction when making decisions.
key_insights.quote: Does the idea of saying yes to this make me feel expansive or contracted?

key_insights.insight: Social Media has an impact on your values that you need to recognize and curate accordingly.
key_insights.quote: This, like a library, is now the greatest influence over my worldview... is me just hitting that follow button.

key_insights.insight: The key to balance is presence and meeting the others needs in a way that that individual can really feel it and be nurtured.
key_insights.quote: It's actually presence and giving him support and love in the way that he can really feel it and how he gets nurtured.

key_insights.insight: Everyone has an internal voice that is encouraging, gentle, and persistent.
key_insights.quote: It is gentle. It is encouraging and it is persistent.

actionable_advice.advice: Track your time meticulously for a week to identify time-wasting activities.
actionable_advice.how_to: Use a time-tracking app or spreadsheet to record how you spend each 15-30 minute block of time.

actionable_advice.advice: Practice 'intuitive shopping' to hone your ability to discern your inner voice.
actionable_advice.how_to: When shopping, pause and ask yourself if you will genuinely use the item. Pay attention to physical sensations of excitement or resistance.
Write, draw, work out, or any activity where you are creating before you get sucked into social media

actionable_advice.advice: Create before you consume media in the morning.
actionable_advice.how_to: Spend time in nature, be with your partner, or write that song instead of watching tv or checking social media as your first activity.

actionable_advice.advice: Swap out "can't" for "won't" to get honest with yourself about your priorities.
actionable_advice.how_to: Whenever you're about to say you can't do something, try on saying "I won't" or "that's not a priority for me right now" and see how your body feels.

memorable_stories: Marie's vivid memory of her mother's financial distress after her parents' divorce, and the promise she made to become financially independent and take care of loved ones.
Marie's story about speaking at her first workshop in her yoga teacher's basement.
contrarian_claims: The traditional path of focusing on one passion is not the way for multi-passionate people, give yourself the permission to thrive in pursuing all interests.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - World Leading Life Coach: 3 Steps To Figuring Out ANYTHING You Want: Marie Forleo
